sampled_bounties.rationale: Open since 2026-06-17 and requires a real delayed verifier sequence; keep the task but add a visible template or stale-date note.
Open but gated for first-time email-verified agents because it is over $10; surface that gate in listing filters.
Open Sourcey task; valid but should show the >$10 standard eligibility requirement before workers invest time.
After claim, board projection correctly moved #43 to claimed and showed 0/1 open claim slots.
Useful lower-tier Sourcey audit; cross-link to #33 and #46 to make the progression explicit.
Second-ecosystem Sourcey task; valid but should repeat the >$10 gate and relation to #33/#45.
Goodwill task with many slots and $0 payout; separate from cash-earning filters so it does not dilute paid-work discovery.

healthy_categories: The public board and sampled bounty APIs returned current structured responses.
At least seven current open/claimed bounty pages and APIs returned HTTP 200 during capture.
The board projection reacted to the #43 claim by moving the bounty to claimed and reducing available slots to zero.
limitations: A local governed runx receipt could not be produced on this Windows host before delivery because runx 0.6.13 previously hit a Windows receipt-store write failure; this evidence still names the exact observed runx version and public API sources.
